title: Export selected columns to excel
excerpt: Is there a way to export only selected columns to Excel? I would love it for there to be a way to select columns and then export those selected clumns to excel. The same you would do with rows. I just don’t get why this …

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to export only selected columns to Excel? I would love it for there to be a way to select columns and then export those selected clumns to excel. The same you would do with rows. I just don’t get why this is not an option…

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mostra - You can create a new view on your board and hide the columns you do not want exported. Then when you export to excel it will only show the columns in that view.

Hope this helps.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml: Ofcourse, that’s a pretty good solution, thanks. And now i wish there was a way to import to excel google spreadsheets… Instead of export to excel and then put it in spreadsheets by hand

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mostra - have you checked out make.com? It will allow you to export from monday to sheets quite easily. This may remove some manual steps for you.

Mark
